text.title: previous_response_id Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns common to Responses API continuity.

antipattern.description: Dropping previous_response_id between turns — reasoning items discarded; full re-derivation cost.
antipattern.reason: Persist in session store keyed by conversation (r1, r2).

antipattern.description: Mixing Responses API + Chat Completions in the same conversation — previous_response_id incompatible.
antipattern.reason: Pick one API per conversation; document migration path.

antipattern.description: No fallback on 404 (id expired) — agent errors out instead of starting fresh.
antipattern.reason: Catch 404, drop id, retry without it (r3).

antipattern.description: Sharing previous_response_id across users — privacy leak.
antipattern.reason: Key session store strictly by (user_id, conversation_id) (r2).
